name: descript
description: Full programmatic access to the Descript API. Proactively activates for: (1) importing media into Descript, (2) Underlord agent edits including bulk metadata operations across whole projects, (3) publishing compositions, (4) bulk video pipelines, (5) Descript job status, (6) local export of MP4, SRT, and Markdown transcripts for chapter generation and offline workflows.

api_token.title: Descript API Token
api_token.description: Personal API token from Descript Settings, API tokens. Scoped to one Drive.

default_profile.title: Default credential profile
default_profile.description: Optional named profile to select when multiple Drives are configured.
